channel.title: Colin Murphy's site
channel.description: Recent content on Colin Murphy's site

item.title: Creating a wireless bridge using a MikroTik router
item.description: How to create a simple wireless bridge with a MikroTik router.

item.title: Access your local network from anywhere with WireGuard VPN
item.description: A guide on how to build a WireGuard VPN that allows you to access local network resources from anywhere

item.title: Booting Linux off an NVMe SSD on an older computer
item.description: How to boot Linux off an NVMe SSD on an unsupported computer.

item.title: Creating a simple adblocking DNS server using dnsmasq
item.description: How to set up a simple adblocking DNS server using dnsmasq and ad-blocking utilities.

item.title: Replacing the Bose amplifier on a Mazda3
item.description: A guide diagnosing and replacing a Bose amplifier on a 2010-2013 Mazda 3
